title: oxyacantha coccinea
intro: Oxyacantha coccinea, also known as the Scarlet Pimpernel, is a flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Oxyacantha coccinea include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve for its medicinal uses, with the tincture being a popular herbal preparation for its medicinal properties.
